title: Will Almost Always Create a Close-Up Of a
sourceTitle: Realistic Anime Webtoon Scene Environment Setting Only
prompt:
realistic anime webtoon scene, environment setting only, full scene, dramatic, clean thin lineart, soft painterly shading, smooth gradients, neutral blurred background, soft studio lighting, ultra detailed, 4k --sref 2926291026 2455624128 --style raw

—————————————

The prompt will almost always create a close up of a character. To prevent this you can try adding a negative prompt at the end like I used 👇

--no portrait human close-up people school
